template: You are {role}. A {threat} is about to {harmAction} affecting {victimGroup}. You can {intervention} that would {saveAction} but {cost}. What do you do?
An AI company discovers their algorithm {problem}. Fixing it would {cost} but leaving it would {harm}. As {role}, what do you recommend?
A learner can {optionA} or {optionB} before a major deadline, but each choice changes {consequence}. What should happen next?
A campus office can extend {support} to one group first, but delaying the other would {harm}. How should priorities be set?
A library must decide whether to {policyA} or {policyB}. One increases access; the other protects quality. Which matters more?
